About.title: About MossGap
About.subtitle: A cozy corner of the internet for browser games. We curate, you play.
About.missionBody: We believe great games should be one click away. No downloads, no installers, no friction - just open a page and start playing. MossGap brings together a handpicked collection of browser games that run anywhere, on any device, in seconds.
About.storyBody: MossGap started as a weekend project to make browser games easier to discover and play. Built on Cloudflare's global edge network, every game loads fast no matter where you are. We're a small team obsessed with playtime - and we're just getting started.
About.feature1Desc: No downloads. No installs. Click and play - games run right in your browser.
About.feature2Desc: Every game is reviewed and sandboxed. Your data stays yours, always.
About.feature3Desc: We handpick each title. No filler, no clutter - just games worth your time.
About.feature4Desc: Desktop, tablet, phone - any device with a modern browser can join the fun.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.subtitle: How we handle your data at MossGap.
Privacy.section1Body: We collect minimal information needed to operate MossGap. This includes anonymous usage data (such as page views and play counts) and your IP address for the sole purpose of spam prevention (like limiting one like per user). We do not sell or share your data with third parties.
Privacy.section2Body: MossGap uses essential cookies and local storage to remember your language preference and theme. We do not use advertising or tracking cookies.
Privacy.section3Body: Games hosted on MossGap run inside a sandboxed iframe. They may set their own cookies or local storage; we recommend reviewing each game's privacy practices separately.
Privacy.section4Body: MossGap is suitable for general audiences. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe a child has provided us personal information, please contact us and we will delete it.
Privacy.section5Body: Have questions about this policy? Reach out via our Contact page and we'll get back to you.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.subtitle: The rules of the playground.
Terms.section1Body: By accessing MossGap, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you don't agree, please don't use the site.
Terms.section2Body: MossGap is provided for personal, non-commercial entertainment. You agree not to misuse the service, attempt to disrupt it, or reverse-engineer any part of the platform.
Terms.section3Body: Games on MossGap are submitted by creators or sourced from public domains. We review each submission but cannot guarantee the accuracy or safety of third-party content.
Terms.section4Body: The MossGap platform, including its design and brand, is protected by intellectual property laws. Game content remains the property of their respective creators.
Terms.section5Body: MossGap is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any damages arising from the use of the service.
Terms.section6Body: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of MossGap after changes means you accept the updated terms.

Seo.homeTitle: Play Free Browser Games Online - MossGap
Seo.homeDescription: MossGap is a browser game arcade. Play free online games instantly - no downloads, no installs. Discover action, puzzle, arcade, adventure and more.
Seo.gamesDescription: Browse the full collection of free browser games on MossGap. Action, puzzle, arcade, adventure, strategy and more - play instantly in your browser.
Seo.gameDetailDescription: Play {title} for free on MossGap. No downloads, no installs - play instantly in your browser.
Seo.playDescription: Play {title} instantly on MossGap - no downloads required.
Seo.categoriesDescription: Explore games by category on MossGap. Find action, puzzle, arcade, adventure and more browser games.
Seo.categoryDescription: Play {name} games for free on MossGap. Browse the best {name} browser games.
Seo.categoryDetailDescription: Play {name} games for free on MossGap. No downloads, no installs - play instantly in your browser.
Seo.tagsDescription: Discover games by tags on MossGap. Find the perfect game by topic, style, and features.

Seo.tagDetailDescription: Play {name} tagged games for free on MossGap. No downloads, no installs - play instantly in your browser.

Seo.collectionDetailDescription: Play curated {name} games for free on MossGap. No downloads, no installs - play instantly.
